introMessages: Something shifts in the basement dark.
Dad pauses. The house has chosen violence.
Something rolls out from under the dryer. It is furious.
A dust bunny emerges from the dark. It does not look like a regular dust bunny.
The basement floor shifts. Whatever this is, it has been waiting.
A Freaky Icky Spider descends from the ceiling on a thread of web.
Something brushes Dad's shoulder in the dark. It has too many legs.
A Freaky Icky Spider emerges from behind the water heater.
Something shifts behind a cardboard box.
A box labeled TAXES 2017 begins to vibrate.
Dad pauses. The garage has chosen violence.
Something rolls out from behind the toolbox. It is not happy.
A dust bunny near the workbench stirs. It looks different. Angrier.
Dad disturbs something near the wrench rack. It disturbs him back.
A Freaky Icky Spider drops from the garage shelf!
A Freaky Icky Spider skitters out from behind the paint cans!
Something moves on the wall. It has too many legs. It knows.
Something shifts behind the shower curtain.
Dad pauses. The bathroom has chosen violence.
A roll of suspiciously thin toilet paper unspools itself menacingly.
Single-Ply Sam tumbles out from under the cabinet.
Something flimsy but determined blocks the path.
A glob of toothpaste oozes off the sink with intent.
The Toothpaste Slime drops from the medicine cabinet.
Something minty and hostile blocks the sink.
The grout near the shower has been waiting for this moment.
A Mold Patch unsticks itself from the tile.
Something green and patient stirs behind the curtain.
The Olfactory Ninja strikes before Dad registers the smell.
A cloud of pure offense materializes near the exhaust fan.
Something silent, deadly, and airborne has entered the room.
